creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Pietro Cerutti from comment #6)

> Right, the ugly thing now is that we have
> 
> catch2 (new): version 3
> catch  (old): version 2

This is the problem of the upstream how they name their project vs. version numbers.

One solution would be to change catch2 to catch3 to reflect the version.
